title: Acianthera per-dusenii
taxonomy: Acianthera per-dusenii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the genus Acianthera, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids. The species is native to Brazil and is a type of epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants without being parasitic. Acianthera per-dusenii is a relatively rare species and is often found in tropical regions. The classification of Acianthera per-dusenii is further divided into several subspecies, but more research is needed to fully understand its taxonomy.
